mapper.sql: id, user_id, total_surveys, completed_surveys, total_points, last_survey_time, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM survey_user_statistic WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE survey_user_statistic SET total_surveys = total_surveys + 1, completed_surveys = completed_surveys + 1, total_points = total_points + COALESCE(#{points}, 0), last_survey_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
